hypothesis: Founders with active enterprise deals will discuss or pay for a fast security-questionnaire readiness review.
action_steps: List five AI founders with enterprise sales motion.
Send a concise message naming procurement questionnaire pain.
Offer a fixed-price readiness review before suggesting any product.
Record every reply, objection, referral, and silence.
success_threshold: One serious reply, booked call, referral to a buyer, or paid review request.
script: Quick question: have enterprise security questionnaires delayed any AI pilot for you? I am testing a 48-hour readiness review that turns messy answers into buyer-ready responses. If this is active pain, would a USD 200 review be useful this week?
give_up_rule: Stop after five messages and one follow-up batch; record silence as a RejectionSignal.
risk_notes: Avoid turning this into a template product before a founder confirms urgency or budget.
